top_signals.title: Read the 14-point memorandum of understanding between the United States and Iran
top_signals.summary: The 14-point memorandum of understanding between the United States and Iran leaves contentious issues between the countries unresolved.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ASML CEO Sees Musk’s Terafab as Test for Supply Lines
top_signals.summary: ASML Holding NV Chief Executive Officer Christophe Fouquet said the chip equipment maker has to make sure it doesn’t experience supply constraints when servicing new projects such as Elon Musk’s Terafab.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SpaceX posts first losing day as stock sinks 5%, losing momentum after a multiday rally
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk's space and AI company has seen its stock surge since its blockbuster IPO on Friday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Fresh land reclamation work begins at Henoko for U.S. base transfer
top_signals.summary: The reclamation work is being done for the planned relocation of the U.S. Marine Corps' Futenma air station from another city in Okinawa.

top_signals.summary: Lincoln acquisition includes 841 acres of real property as well as 2,540 acre-feet of annual water rights across three permits.
